transcript: --pick 'em up, you're gon' meet with my whip.
Are you as stupid as you sound?
Uh, nope. You gon' be layin' on the ground. How's that sound to you?
Listen here, buddy, you ready to meet up wit' it? My whip? [exhales]
Listen here, bud. I don't know how stupid you are, but if... uh, if you're as stupid as you... look, as stupid as you sound, you're in a hell of a state.
Oh, you're gonna meet up with my foot in your mouth--
Well, let's get it over with.
I got my shotgun right here ready for you. You step up to the door and I'll blow your goddamn head off.
You gonna meet up with my chain pretty quick.
--round your neck, how's that sound? How's that sound to ya?
--you're a hell of a poor cop, I'll tell you that.
If you're a cop, you're a goddamn... I don't know what kinda cop you are, but you ain't a... human cop.
Yeah, I'm gon' kick your butt pretty quick. [exhales] With my whip.
Oh, no, I wouldn't say that.
You will be when you're layin' on the ground cryin'.
You'll be layin' out there, your goddamn bricks... brains scattered all over the goddamned sidewalk.
If you got any brains in there to splatter.
Hell, I'm gonna lock you up in the freezer. How's that sound, man?
[laughs] Ohhh, you... you're I don't know what. Yeah, I enjoy talkin' to a goddamn thing like you.
What? Bring it on, c'mon! Right now!
I got my fists up, they're ready to whack ya right in the goddamned teeth.
I'ma punch you in the lip. [exhales]
